$description: Component tokens for Mobile Toggle switch component with Android and iOS platform variants. Supports pressed (checked) and unpressed (unchecked) states with default, hover, focus, disabled, and error states. Includes Default and Icon variants. Figma Reference: Node ID 20-70104

$component.name: Toggle
$component.description: A mobile toggle switch component for binary on/off states. Supports both Android and iOS platform-specific designs. Consists of a track (container) and a thumb/knob (sliding element). Android variant uses circular thumb, iOS variant uses pill-shaped knob. Includes optional icon variant with icon inside thumb.
$component.structure: Track container with rounded background, containing a thumb/knob element that slides between positions. Track changes color based on pressed state. Android uses circular thumb, iOS uses wider pill-shaped knob.

sizes.android: 28px height, 52px width (pressed) - Android platform toggle with 24px circular thumb
sizes.ios: 28px height, 64px width (pressed) - iOS platform toggle with 24px height x 39px width pill-shaped knob

variants.icon: Toggle with icon displayed inside thumb/knob
variants.android: Android platform design with circular thumb
variants.ios: iOS platform design with pill-shaped knob

usage.contexts: Mobile settings panels, mobile forms, feature toggles, preferences, configuration screens, mobile data entry interfaces
usage.features: Platform-specific designs (Android/iOS), Binary state switching, focus indicators, hover feedback, disabled state, error validation, icon variant support
